name: QuestionnaireAnswerKey
title: Questionnaire Answer Key
description:
Indicates the official/agreed 'correct' answers for a Questionnaire that represents a test or similar instrument.

The referenced QuestionnaireResponse **SHALL** have a `QuestionnaireResponse.questionnaire` that refers to the referencing Questionnaire.

NOTE: There might need to be restrictions on access to the answerKey QuestionnaireResponse to protect the integrity of the instrument.

element.definition: Indicates the official/agreed 'correct' answers for a Questionnaire that represents a test or similar instrument.
